Mosaic dataset side-tables

[Guid("392F4760-0314-4B4E-9733-97FBB97B6B35")]
public enum esriMosaicDatasetSideTable

Fields

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableAnalysis = 512

512: The mosaic dataset primary analysis result side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableBoundary = 2

2: The mosaic dataset boundary side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableCache = 4096

4096: The mosaic dataset cache side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableCatalog = 1

1: The mosaic dataset catalog side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableDefinition = 8192

8192: The mosaic dataset definition side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableDodging = 128

128: The mosaic dataset color correction (dodging) side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableLevels = 8

8: The mosaic dataset cell size levels side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableLog = 16

16: The mosaic dataset log side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableOverview = 32

32: The mosaic dataset overview side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableRasterType = 4

4: The mosaic dataset raster type side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableSeamline = 64

64: The mosaic dataset seamline side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableStatus = 1024

1024: The mosaic dataset auxiliary analysis status side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableStereo = 256

256: The mosaic dataset stereo side-table.

esriMosaicDatasetSideTableView = 2048

2048: The mosaic dataset view side-table.
